appSettingsResource.name: [format('{0}/{1}', parameters('name'), 'appsettings')]
appSettingsResource.properties: [union(createObject('APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY', parameters('appInsightsInstrumentationKey'), 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString'), 'AzureWebJobsSecretStorageKeyVaultUri', parameters('keyVaultUri'), 'AzureWebJobsSecretStorageType', 'keyvault', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__blobServiceUri', format('https://{0}.blob.core.windows.net', parameters('storageAccountName')), 'AzureWebJobsStorage__credential', 'managedidentity', 'AzureWebJobsStorage__queueServiceUri', format('https://{0}.queue.core.windows.net', parameters('storageAccountName')), 'AzureWebJobsStorage__tableServiceUri', format('https://{0}.table.core.windows.net', parameters('storageAccountName')), 'ENABLE_ORYX_BUILD', 'true', 'FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION', '~4', 'FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME', 'python', 'KEY_VAULT_NAME', parameters('keyVaultName'), 'KEY_VAULT_URI', parameters('keyVaultUri'), 'SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT', 'true'), parameters('appSettings'))]
